description: Implement worktree creation: Add CreateWorktree(projectPath, branchName, worktreePath string) error function to pkg/worktree package. Execute 'git worktree add <path> -b <branch>' command. Handle errors (branch exists, invalid path). Integrate into TUI: when 'c' pressed, show input form for branch name, then create worktree in <projectPath>/../<branchName>. Refresh worktree list after creation.
note: Updated with prerequisites and file references
acceptance_criteria: CreateWorktree(projectPath, branchName, worktreePath string) error function exists
Returns error with message if branch exists or path invalid
TUI shows text input form when c key pressed
After creation, TUI refreshes worktree list to show new worktree
New worktree created at path: projectPath/../branchName

verification.value: Press c, enter branch name, verify new worktree created and appears in list
